testimonials.name: Satoshi Guy
testimonials.quote:
This is exactly what Bitcoin family adoption looks like.
If you're a father or family looking for a fun project that teaches your kids about Bitcoin, self-sovereignty, and saving, I can't recommend this enough. It's hands-on STEM learning meets financial education. Build it together, learn together, stack together.

testimonials.name: Edi
testimonials.quote: Piggy2piggy :) the boys are going crazy everytime something comes in. Best project I ever did, worth every minute and is the building block for our future to educate the youngest

testimonials.name: Eluc
testimonials.quote: We had fun building these with the kids, even without a 3D printer, nor a laser cuter, we could figure it out.
